Claw of Lightning  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 14 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +8 DEX: +8 AGI: +8
SV MAGIC: +10
Haste: +41%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR RNG ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Claw of Lightning
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 14 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +8 DEX: +8 AGI: +8
SV MAGIC: +10
Haste: +41%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY

Race: ALL

Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live

Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55

Post Comment
Vs Epic
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2004 at 2:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1603066958094
210 posts
These are a fine epic replacement for a ranger IF---- you don't use them all the time. When using a bow - you would want Swiftwind in your off hand. Specially if you are doing an AOE fight. So if you are doing your ranger duty and fighting from the side or behind --- then this is the optimum choice. But if you are tanking for an exp group then the bonuses of Swiftwind would outway the greater Ratio.

We recently got one of these for a Ranger that - I think had epic - and A Warrior that really needed a haste item.

#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 31 2001 at 5:51 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) everyone knows rangers give out the most damage hehe., nah but seriously, on a plane raid in hate, i was in the KS xp group, it had a monk, 2 rangers, shammy, and various other classes in last spot, didnt matter, we ruled, go monks and rangers! speed kills!
Optimism
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2001 at 6:26 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593965834769
45 posts
We handed Eashan his **** yesterday an picked one of these up.

Heres the idea behind Verants loot placement. Epic weapons (all of them) have a use in the game at every possible level and each have thier role, even ranger, warrior, or rogue epic items. You will understand this when you reach 60 and into the highest end of the game. With items like these, it gives 60th level players a reason to continue playing. There are no more charecter advancements beyond 60 than loot. You can say these claws are better than a ranger's epic, but then again only in situational circumstances. Same thing with other classes and thier epics.

Verant made epic items to be the "peak" usage item for that class. There may be items that come close or exceed in certain situations, but every charecter will be much more rounded and useful with an epic rather than any single ToV, ST, or VP item.


Perfection = Repitition & Situational Adaptation
▲ Page top
RE: Optimism
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2002 at 2:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252761301
13 posts

With the Coming of the Planes of Power this might be delayed to when you advance past lvl 60 but when you reach your cap you probobly will still continue looking for the most powerful and/or good looking loot
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 13 2001 at 5:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) fully hasted this ***** is only 14/14, not that great. I would rather pull out something a little lower dammage so I can hit faster. but you konw thats just my opinion.
RE: Ehhhh
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2001 at 6:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965834769
45 posts
Haste is calulated by this formula...

D-(D(2/H))

D=Delay
H=Haste

With max haste (105% @ level 60) would bring the weapon to 14/8.55, but theres a theory that minimum delay can only be 10, so well either way you have a vary fast and painful weapon. With the attached 40% haste to the claw, that opens up for a modest 65% from an enchanters speed stick that perfectly matches the weapons maximum limitations while opening up that much useable back or waist slot for something more useful. IMO, its a vary impressive item.
▲ Page top
RE: Ehhhh
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2002 at 11:27 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248015127
33 posts
Your formula does not calculate. try this one..


delay x's haste = delay adjustment

delay - delay adjustment = New delay

ie.

lammy 9/19

19 x .4 = 7.6
19 - 7.6 = 11.4

so this delay will work is not below 10..however i am not sure about the 10delay rule.
▲ Page top
RE: Ehhhh
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2002 at 2:26 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591771608578
Scholar
16 posts
Sorry Prothos, but your formula doesn't calculate either. There are few instances where being a math major comes in handy in real life, but as we're talking abot EQ and not real life I feel I can speak with confidence.
Now let's start off with the basic concepts. When you add 100% to something you double it. (x + 100%x = 2x) So if you were to recieve 100% haste, you would move twice as fast. Another way to put that is to say your delay would be cut in half.
So the delay of a lammy at 100% haste should be 9.5 (half of 19). However with the formula you gave, we would get
19 x 1 = 19
(Delay x Haste = Delay Adjustment)
19 - 19 = 0
(Delay - Delay Adjustment = New Delay)
So by your formula the delay of a lammy at 100% haste is 0. And that just ain't right.

You were right about one thing, the formula given by Strahm is wrong also. Applying his formula to a lammy at 100% haste would give
D - D(2/H)
= 19 - 19(2/100%)
= 19 - 19(2/1)
= 19 - 19(2)
= 19 - 38
= -19.
So Strahm's formula gives you a negative delay. And that really ain't right.

THE CORRECT FORMULA FOR CALCULATING HASTE FOLLOWS:
(Delay/(1+Haste)) = New Delay
It's that easy.
I'll check myself using a lammy at 100% haste since I like that example.
(19/(1 + 100%))
= (19/2)
= 9.5
And there you have it folks.

Back to the Claws of Lightning now. With a delay of 18 and an effect of 40% Haste your delay would be
(18/(1+.4))
= 12.857.... which verant probably rounds up so these claws become 14/13 weapons before any spell or song haste.
Please people spread this formula around. There are so many incorrect formulae around people are getting confused.
▲ Page top
RE: Ehhhh
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2003 at 9:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570644273
14 posts
Raythe hit the nail on the head. The only comment I have is that the formula should have read as follows, in order to calculate correctly:

Weapon Delay/[1+(haste/100] = New Delay

I say this only to clear up the conversion from the % to a decimal that some people have not picked up on yet.
▲ Page top
RE: Ehhhh
QuoteReply
# May 30 2002 at 7:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361458585
109 posts
You hit the nail on the head Raythe. Well done.
That is the correct formula.

New Delay = Orgn. Delay / (1+ haste %)
▲ Page top
RE: Ehhhh
QuoteReply
# Apr 23 2002 at 6:23 PM Rating: Default
Zaztik
648 posts
What the hell?? I dont understand your theory. 1 + the haste percentage? Wouldn't that make 100% = 101%?

Can you do you're theory for me with 40% haste (ranger epic) and a lammy (9/19)? Thanks.
▲ Page top
RE: Ehhhh
QuoteReply
# Apr 24 2002 at 11:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253820829
1 post
Percent means "parts out of 100"
So 100% is 100 parts out of 100, or 100/100
Thus 100% translates into 1.
So 1+100% would be 2.

Using his formulae, a lammy (9/19) at 40% haste would be...
19/(1+.4)
= 19/1.4
= 13.57
Rounded, you'd effectivly be 9/14
▲ Page top
RE: Ehhhh
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2002 at 6:00 PM Rating: Default
Zaztik
648 posts
Thanks a lot, I understand now.
▲ Page top
#Zaztik, Posted: Apr 23 2002 at 6:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) What the hell?? I dont understand your theory. 1 + the haste percentage? Wouldn't that make 100% = 101%?
RE: Ehhhh
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2002 at 12:08 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763671954
View User Forum
33 posts
Hey, I'm not flaming you guys in anyway, I just gotta now how the heck you came up with that equation? I think it all comes bck to E=MC2, Or Pi=3.14-etc. But what do I know about Everquest? I thought that the stuff I learned in school wouldn't help me. doh!
▲ Page top
RE: Ehhhh
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2003 at 1:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361458585
109 posts
Hehe, here goes.
New Delay = Old Delay/Haste Ratio.
At 0% haste New Delay = Old Delay, which means Old Delay/1.
If a weapon is 100% hasted, that means it will swing twice as fast. (using 10dmg/20dly weapon to make it simpler) A 20dly weapon will now become 10.
Hence 10 (new Delay) = 20 (Old Delay)/ 2 (Ratio of 1 + 1).

I think that's as best as I can explain it.
▲ Page top
RE: Ehhhh
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2001 at 6:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570700423
23 posts
and let's not forget that the haste affects the other 1hs weapon you are using, if you are doing so
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 20 2001 at 8:38 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Your an idiot, no one cares what you think.
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 25 2001 at 1:57 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This has to be the best wepon in the game YEA!!!
uber gear
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2001 at 3:12 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591765620854
2 posts


its pointless to endlessly debate on what class should get these uber items. the guilds that are aquiring them have their own systems for awarding loot. there are soo many factors that influence loot placement... raid attendance, seniority, current weapons and armor, class, etc. this gear will never be obtained by a pickup raid, these mobs require a very tight raid force to kill. it seems like the people that have the strongest oppinions are the ones that havent even been to Temple of Veeshan. please... give it a rest.


as for the lightning claw, its a very nice offhand weapon for any class listed. im a ranger with one and its a great upgrade over the swiftwind. i would say it increases my damage output by about 15% over the swiftwind and without adding any extra taunt. epics are nice but they dont have to be the "end all, be all" of EQ weapons, there should always be something better to get.... thats half the fun of EQ.


Trillium Silveroak
Warder of Midnight Sojourn
Forest Stalker of Erollisi Marr

# Aug 12 2001 at 2:25 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591751231908
90 posts
Why is verant so stupid. Epics come out, people strive as hard as they can to solve the quests. Everyone searches for the epic starters (I helped to find some at the start) and then they try to figure out what to do. Many people are in awe of the few that pop up to the best people on the server, then more and more show up, we are happy. Then velious, we explore, find stuff. BAM! Fck the epics, they suck. Well, gifts from the gods themselves can't hold their candle to little dragon items.

Question
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2001 at 9:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965843206
13 posts
Alright I have a question, everybody talks about Ragebringer and Primal spear being best combo for a rogue, why would it not be better to have this in offhand and Primal in Main or something similar? I'm just wondering if there is something I don't know.
▲ Page top
so much misinformation...
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 11:38 AM Rating: Default
Darknyss
Scholar
551 posts
brain... gonna explode....
First off...HASTE... one haste ITEM per haste... spells, songs, items stack but NO... you can't use a FBSS, CoF, and This weapon to get SUPER-HASTE...
Secondly... better than Primal?... I guess the ratio is better... you just have to ignore the +5 to EVERY STAT and RESIST, +50 HP and MANA, and the Avatar proc that adds 100 to STR, DEX, AGI, and ATK.... hmm... yah, if you ignore that this is better..
Lastly, do you want to know EXACTLY who will get this weapon?... probably somebody who has a better weapon and doesn't need it... because we all know Verant has about 3 out of their 1 billion quests that have the true risk=reward factor.
____________________________
Pain Lord Darknyss Grimscale
92 Iksar Crusader of the Greenmist
▲ Page top
holy !!!
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2001 at 7:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592342811123
View User Forum
Scholar
9,575 posts
...ok, I have now found that there is no logical reason to raid ST. Sleepers Tomb is MUCH harder to get into than ToV, and the mobs are MUCH harder. Here, you go into ToV, and get a weapon that has both better damage (14 vs. 13) and ratio (18 vs. 20) than the Primal weapons. And that ratio is NOT including haste! This is FAR better than the epic weapons, and FAR better than the ST weapons! This, in other words, is THE best 1hs in the game. Period, no ifs, ands or buts.
▲ Page top
RE: holy !!!
QuoteReply
# Aug 04 2001 at 12:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764362958
7 posts
ST harder than ToV? Um, you can take 18 ppl into ST and wipe out everything up to the warders. First 3 warders are doable with 24. After the first 3 fairly easy ones, the 4th is orders of magnitude harder. This weapon is not the standard in ToV, it's the exception. This weapon is Yelinak, Aaryonar or a mob along those lines loot IMO, or should be rather. I agree that having the best offhander in the game coming from Eashen (who is pretty much a pushover) while AoW drops a 15/23 1 hander is pretty damn stupid and obtuse on VI's part, but the only thing that makes ST difficult is the fact that it's keyed. If ST were not a keyed dungeon it would be permacamped by every 58+ chump and his bradda. Most of the mobs there are NOT that hard. 3 group kills are not hard mobs.

Funny thing about this weapon is lvl 50-51 twinks were allowed to loot it because it was fairly crappy before the big ToV loot patch. Now there's high ranking mains jealous of people's twinks lol.
